suite.name: V0.0.1 Acceptance

test.name: Application Loads Without Crashing

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\angular\\browser\\traces\\temp\\f8e03cbd-2c66-4b81-96ef-6eedabb79bed"}
Starting Browser process C:\Users\saint\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python312\site-packages\Browser\wrapper\index.js using at 127.0.0.1:53478

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":false,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":30000,"tracesDir":"C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\angular\\browser\\traces\\temp\\f8e03cbd-2c66-4b81-96ef-6eedabb79bed"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:4200
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector h1 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Opens a fresh browser window and navigates to the app. Waits until the main heading is visible before returning.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['Iconify Navigator']
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: The main heading must be rendered and no error banner must be visible after the page finishes loading.

test.name: Available Icon Sets Are Listed On Startup

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\angular\\browser\\traces\\temp\\ce244c64-906d-4ab7-b0ab-25a33185a1d9"}

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":false,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":30000,"tracesDir":"C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\angular\\browser\\traces\\temp\\ce244c64-906d-4ab7-b0ab-25a33185a1d9"}

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:4200
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector h1 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Opens a fresh browser window and navigates to the app. Waits until the main heading is visible before returning.

kw.name: Collections Are Loaded
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector .collection-card >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

Blocks until at least one collection card is visible, meaning the /collections API call has completed. Uses >> nth=0 to target the first card and avoid strict-mode violations (the API returns 200+ collections).

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: The collections list must contain at least one entry once the /collections response has been received.

test.name: Icons Are Not Preloaded On Startup

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\angular\\browser\\traces\\temp\\f18a2aef-b9e9-447d-8e36-330099a4bf51"}

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:4200
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector h1 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Opens a fresh browser window and navigates to the app. Waits until the main heading is visible before returning.

kw.name: Collections Are Loaded
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector .collection-card >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

Blocks until at least one collection card is visible, meaning the /collections API call has completed. Uses >> nth=0 to target the first card and avoid strict-mode violations (the API returns 200+ collections).

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: No full-size icon images must appear in the right panel before the user explicitly opens a collection. Collection cards may show preview thumbnails (.collection-preview-img) but the right-panel icon grid (.icon-img) must remain empty.

suite.doc:
Acceptance tests for Iconify Navigator — release 0.0.1.
Criteria: - The application must not crash. - The application must not preload icon data on startup. - The application must display the list of available icon sets fetched from the Iconify server using the /collections endpoint.
Prerequisites: the app must be running on http://localhost:4200.

suite.name: V0.0.2 Acceptance

test.name: Collection Cards Show Name Label

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\angular\\browser\\traces\\temp\\fca2b5c5-945b-4c4b-8ac0-cb987c14d1e3"}

kw.name: Collections Are Loaded
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector .collection-card >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

Blocks until at least one collection card is visible, meaning the /collections API call has completed. Uses >> nth=0 to target the first card and avoid strict-mode violations (the API returns 200+ collections).

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg:
Text: ['Name: Material Symbols

Category: Material

Tags: Has Padding

Open']
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Every visible collection must display a "Name:" label so the user can identify the icon set.

test.name: Collections List Shows Category And Tags Labels

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser

kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Among all loaded collections at least one must show a "Category:" label and at least one a "Tags:" label.

test.name: Open Button Is Present For Each Collection

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\angular\\browser\\traces\\temp\\94e9db6e-136c-491a-a1a9-9002afdc7d75"}

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":false,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":30000,"tracesDir":"C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\angular\\browser\\traces\\temp\\94e9db6e-136c-491a-a1a9-9002afdc7d75"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:4200
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector h1 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Opens a fresh browser window and navigates to the app. Waits until the main heading is visible before returning.

kw.name: Collections Are Loaded
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector .collection-card >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

Blocks until at least one collection card is visible, meaning the /collections API call has completed. Uses >> nth=0 to target the first card and avoid strict-mode violations (the API returns 200+ collections).

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.msg: ${buttons} = 230
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.msg: ${cards} = 230
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Every collection card must contain an "Open" button; the button count must equal the card count.

test.name: Collection Cards Show Preview Icons

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\angular\\browser\\traces\\temp\\62ccb3cc-9cef-40d8-940d-6d30f30f5e0e"}

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":false,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":30000,"tracesDir":"C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\angular\\browser\\traces\\temp\\62ccb3cc-9cef-40d8-940d-6d30f30f5e0e"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:4200
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector h1 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Opens a fresh browser window and navigates to the app. Waits until the main heading is visible before returning.

kw.name: Collections Are Loaded
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector .collection-card >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

Blocks until at least one collection card is visible, meaning the /collections API call has completed. Uses >> nth=0 to target the first card and avoid strict-mode violations (the API returns 200+ collections).

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector .collection-preview-img >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait For Image To Load
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Image Should Be Loaded
Evaluate JavaScript
kw.msg: JavaScript executed successfully.
kw.doc: Executes given javascript on the selected element(s) or on page.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Image not yet loaded or broken: ${selector}
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Single-attempt helper for Wait For Image To Load. Fails immediately if the image has not finished loading.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.
Polls an img element until naturalWidth > 0, which confirms the browser has fully fetched and decoded the image file. naturalWidth stays 0 for broken or not-yet-loaded images.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: After the collections list loads, each card must show a preview grid of up to 8 icons (class collection-preview-img, 48×48 px). The IntersectionObserver fires for visible cards so at least one preview image must have loaded.

test.name: Opening A Collection Displays Icon Images

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:4200
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector h1 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Opens a fresh browser window and navigates to the app. Waits until the main heading is visible before returning.

kw.name: Collections Are Loaded
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector .collection-card >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

Blocks until at least one collection card is visible, meaning the /collections API call has completed. Uses >> nth=0 to target the first card and avoid strict-mode violations (the API returns 200+ collections).

kw.name: Open First Collection
Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element '.open-button >> nth=0'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector .icon-img >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Clicks the first "Open" button and waits until at least one full-size icon image is rendered in the right panel. Uses >> nth=0 to avoid strict-mode violations.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Image To Load
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Image Should Be Loaded
Evaluate JavaScript
kw.msg: JavaScript executed successfully.
kw.doc: Executes given javascript on the selected element(s) or on page.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Image not yet loaded or broken: ${selector}
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Single-attempt helper for Wait For Image To Load. Fails immediately if the image has not finished loading.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.
Polls an img element until naturalWidth > 0, which confirms the browser has fully fetched and decoded the image file. naturalWidth stays 0 for broken or not-yet-loaded images.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: After clicking "Open" the right panel must show icon images (class icon-img). At least one must have loaded (naturalWidth > 0).

test.name: Opened Collection Section Heading Contains Collection Name

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: The right-panel heading must follow the pattern "<Collection Name> - Icons" so the user knows which set is open. The second h2 on the page belongs to the right panel.

test.name: Opening A Different Collection Replaces Previous Icons

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser

Blocks until at least one collection card is visible, meaning the /collections API call has completed. Uses >> nth=0 to target the first card and avoid strict-mode violations (the API returns 200+ collections).

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['Material Symbols - Icons']
${first_heading} = Material Symbols - Icons
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element '.open-button >> nth=1'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Heading Should Change
Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['Material Symbols Light - Icons']
${current} = Material Symbols Light - Icons
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are equal.
Asserts that the second h2 on the page no longer contains the provided text. Used to verify the right panel updated.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Clicking "Open" on a second collection must replace the right-panel content with that collection's icons. The heading changes, confirming the panel was updated.

suite.doc:
Acceptance tests for Iconify Navigator — release 0.0.2.
Criteria: - The view is split into left (collection list) and right (icon detail) panels. - Each collection card displays Name, Category, Tags plus the first 8 icons as a 2×4 preview grid (48×48 px each, class collection-preview-img). - Each card has an "Open" button (label: Open). - Pressing Open shows the full icon set in the right panel. - Pressing Open on the already-displayed collection does nothing. - Pressing Open on a different collection replaces the right-panel content. - The right panel scrolls; icons must have non-zero dimensions.
Prerequisites: the app must be running on http://localhost:4200.
